title: Contacts
description: Inferred JSON Schema for additional Contacts linked to a Name record in MoneyWorks. This table stores contacts beyond the first two, which are fields in the Name table. Internal Name: Contacts (inferred).

SequenceNumber.description: Internal unique identifier for the contact record itself.

LastModifiedTime.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the contact record was modified.

ParentSeq.description: Foreign key linking to the SequenceNumber of the parent Name record. Indexed.

Order.description: The display order of this contact within the parent Name record's contact list.

ContactName.description: The contact person's name. Corresponds to Name.Contact and Name.Contact2 for the first two.

Salutation.description: The contact's salutation (e.g., Mr., Ms., Dr.). Corresponds to Name.Salutation and Name.Salutation2.

Position.description: The contact's position or job title within the organisation. Corresponds to Name.Position and Name.Position2.

Phone.description: The contact's direct phone number or DDI. Corresponds to Name.DDI and Name.DDI2.

Mobile.description: The contact's mobile phone number. Corresponds to Name.Mobile and Name.Mobile2.

AfterHours.description: The contact's after-hours phone number. Corresponds to Name.AfterHours and Name.AfterHours2.

eMail.description: The contact's email address. Corresponds to Name.eMail and Name.eMail2.

Memo.description: General memo or notes specifically about this contact.

Role.description: Represents the roles assigned to the contact (e.g., Payables, CEO). Stored as a bitmask. Corresponds to Name.Role and Name.Role2. Bitmask field where each bit corresponds to one of the 16 possible roles defined in Preferences.

UserNum.description: A user-defined number field for custom data storage, often used by scripts. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

UserText.description: A user-defined text field for custom data storage, often used by scripts. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

TaggedText.description: Stores key-value pairs for custom data, primarily accessed via scripting functions GetTaggedValue/SetTaggedValue. (Mutable: freely, script-only)
